allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat\(Windows\): macOS-style fixed chrome header for sidebar' --body ' *)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; prs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'#{p[\\"number\\"]} {p[\\"title\\"]} by @{p[\\"author\\"][\\"login\\"]}'\) for p in prs]")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json prs=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for p in prs: print\(f'#{p[\\"number\\"]} [{p[\\"headRefName\\"]}] {p[\\"title\\"]} by @{p[\\"author\\"][\\"login\\"]}'\) ")
